title: Update your TFN registration details
description: Check how you can update your TFN registration details, including your name, date of birth, bank details and gender.
keywords: update address, update contact details, change address, change my details, update contact information, bank details, bank account, update bank account, update bank details, change details, personal details, name change, change of name, Change, details, update, name, address, contact details, nominated representative, date of birth, gender, sex

child_links.title: Update your personal contact details
child_links.description: How to update your contact details online, by phone or by post.

child_links.title: Update your name
child_links.description: How to update your name and title online, by phone or by post. You may need an identity document.

child_links.title: Update your date of birth record
child_links.description: How to update your date of birth record online, by phone or by post. You will need an identity document.

child_links.title: Update your gender
child_links.description: You can ask us to change your gender (sex) information by providing a certified copy of certain documents.

child_links.title: Update your financial institution details
child_links.description: How to update your financial institution (bank) details online or by phone.
